dates.summary: Amazon reportedly committed another $5 billion to Anthropic, alongside a massive AWS capacity and spending arrangement that includes up to 5 GW of compute and a reported $100 billion cloud commitment, making it the clearest strategic capex signal in frontier AI. AWS also launched SageMaker G7e instances built on NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs with 96 GB GDDR7 per GPU, while ByteDance Seed previewed Seed 2.0 and introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM as it expands its multimodal model lineup.
